---
title: Templates gallery
description: Visual previews of every first-party Shotcraft template, rendered against a real app.
---

Six first-party templates ship today. Each is its own npm package — install
only the ones you need.

The previews below were rendered by Shotcraft itself against the
[BudgetBug](https://budgetbug.live) example app. Source for each
template is in [`packages/template-*`](https://github.com/miopea/shotcraft/tree/main/packages).

## App Store iPhone

Apple's iPhone 6.5" tier — required for App Store Connect submissions.

`@shotcraft/template-app-store-iphone` · 1284 × 2778 · dark + light

<div class="sample-grid">
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/app-store-iphone/dashboard-dark.png"
      alt="App Store iPhone dark sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Dark</strong>
      <span>1284 × 2778</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/app-store-iphone/dashboard-light.png"
      alt="App Store iPhone light sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Light</strong>
      <span>1284 × 2778</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## App Store iPad

Apple's iPad 13" tier — required for App Store Connect submissions when
your app declares iPad support.

`@shotcraft/template-app-store-ipad` · 2064 × 2752 · dark + light

  <div class="sample-card">

      <span>2064 × 2752</span>

</div>

## Play Store phone

Google Play's recommended phone screenshot tier. Brighter Material-coded
gradient holds attention against Play Store's busy UI.

`@shotcraft/template-play-store-phone` · 1080 × 1920 · dark + light

<div class="sample-grid">
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/play-store-phone/dashboard-dark.png"
      alt="Play Store phone dark sample"
      loading="lazy"

      <strong>Dark</strong>
      <span>1080 × 1920</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/play-store-phone/dashboard-light.png"
      alt="Play Store phone light sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Light</strong>
      <span>1080 × 1920</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Play Store tablet

Google Play's 7" tablet tier (16:10 landscape). Asymmetric two-pane layout
with the device tilted toward the viewer.

`@shotcraft/template-play-store-tablet` · 1920 × 1200 · dark + light

<div class="sample-grid">
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/play-store-tablet/dashboard-dark.png"
      alt="Play Store tablet dark sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Dark</strong>
      <span>1920 × 1200</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/play-store-tablet/dashboard-light.png"
      alt="Play Store tablet light sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Light</strong>
      <span>1920 × 1200</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## README hero

GitHub README hero image — sized to fit a typical README content column on
desktop and mobile-rendered docs. Both themes ship as separate composites
so you can swap with `<picture>` and `prefers-color-scheme`:

```html
<picture>
  <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="./screenshots/readme-hero/hero-dark.png" />
  <img src="./screenshots/readme-hero/hero-light.png" alt="..." />
</picture>
```

`@shotcraft/template-readme-hero` · 1280 × 640 · dark + light

<div class="sample-grid">
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img src="/samples/readme-hero/hero-dark.png" alt="README hero dark sample" loading="lazy" />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Dark</strong>
      <span>1280 × 640</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img src="/samples/readme-hero/hero-light.png" alt="README hero light sample" loading="lazy" />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Light</strong>
      <span>1280 × 640</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Open Graph / Twitter card

Open Graph (1200 × 630) — the standard size Twitter, Slack, Discord,
LinkedIn, Notion, etc. all preview against. Single dark theme by design,
caption-dominant for thumbnail legibility.

`@shotcraft/template-social-og-card` · 1200 × 630 · dark only

<div class="sample-grid">
  <div class="sample-card">
    <img
      src="/samples/social-og-card/card-dark.png"
      alt="Social OG card dark sample"
      loading="lazy"
    />
    <div class="meta">
      <strong>Dark</strong>
      <span>1200 × 630</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

## Building your own

Templates are regular npm packages. The contract is small — see
[Build your own template](/contributing/templates/) for the end-to-end
walkthrough.
